redactionRules: Mask subscription IDs, tenant IDs, principal IDs, object IDs, user emails, UPNs, tokens, SAS URLs, and private query content before committing screenshots.
Use demo accounts and non-sensitive BLAST inputs only.
Do not publish screenshots with browser devtools, personal bookmarks, or local filesystem paths.

targets.title: Dashboard overview
targets.notes: Capture a populated monitoring state with cluster, storage, ACR, terminal, and jobs cards visible.

targets.title: New BLAST search
targets.notes: Capture a valid draft search with program, database, query, compute, and command preview visible.

targets.title: Recent jobs
targets.notes: Capture at least one completed or running demo job.

targets.title: Job results
targets.notes: Replace {demoJobId} with a safe demo job before capture.

targets.title: Browser terminal
targets.notes: Capture a connected terminal with no secrets in scrollback.

targets.title: API Reference
targets.notes: Capture the endpoint list and a representative request panel.

targets.title: Dashboard mobile
targets.notes: Use this to verify navigation and card stacking on narrow screens.
